sentences.text: The song that she performed at the concert was written by a local artist.
sentences.translation_zh: 她在音乐会上表演的那首歌是由一位本地艺术家写的。
sentences.translation_vi: Bai hat ma co ay trinh dien tai buoi hoa nhac duoc viet boi mot nghe si dia phuong.

sentences.text: It is said that classical music can improve concentration and reduce stress.
sentences.translation_zh: 据说古典音乐可以提高注意力并减轻压力。
sentences.translation_vi: Nguoi ta noi rang nhac co dien co the cai thien su tap trung va giam cang thang.

constituents.label_vi: chu ngu menh de danh tu
vi ngu thu nhat + tan ngu
vi ngu thu hai + tan ngu

sentences.text: The band whose album topped the charts is coming to our city next month.
sentences.translation_zh: 那支专辑登上排行榜首位的乐队下个月要来我们的城市。
sentences.translation_vi: Ban nhac co album dung dau bang xep hang se den thanh pho cua chung toi vao thang sau.

sentences.text: She was taught to play the piano by her grandmother when she was young.
sentences.translation_zh: 她小时候由祖母教她弹钢琴。
sentences.translation_vi: Co ay duoc ba day choi piano khi co ay con nho.

sentences.text: I have been listening to jazz since I discovered it in college.
sentences.translation_zh: 自从我在大学发现爵士乐以来，我一直在听。
sentences.translation_vi: Toi da nghe nhac jazz tu khi toi kham pha no o dai hoc.

constituents.label_vi: chu ngu + vi ngu tiep dien

sentences.text: The lyrics of the song were inspired by the poet's journey through Asia.
sentences.translation_zh: 这首歌的歌词灵感来自于这位诗人穿越亚洲的旅程。
sentences.translation_vi: Loi bai hat duoc lay cam hung tu cuoc hanh trinh qua chau A cua nha tho.

sentences.text: He asked whether I would like to attend the music festival with him.
sentences.translation_zh: 他问我是否愿意和他一起参加音乐节。
sentences.translation_vi: Anh ay hoi lieu toi co muon tham du le hoi am nhac cung anh ay khong.

sentences.text: Although I enjoy pop music, I think that folk songs have deeper meanings.
sentences.translation_zh: 虽然我喜欢流行音乐，但我认为民歌有更深层的含义。
sentences.translation_vi: Mac du toi thich nhac pop, toi nghi rang nhac dan gian co y nghia sau sac hon.

sentences.text: The musician who won the Grammy has released a new single this week.
sentences.translation_zh: 获得格莱美奖的那位音乐家本周发布了一首新单曲。
sentences.translation_vi: Nhac si gianh giai Grammy da phat hanh mot dia don moi trong tuan nay.

sentences.text: The rhythm of the drums echoed through the valley where the ceremony was held.
sentences.translation_zh: 鼓的节奏回荡在举行仪式的山谷中。
sentences.translation_vi: Nhip trong vang vong khap thung lung noi buoi le duoc to chuc.

sentences.text: Many traditional instruments are being replaced by electronic synthesizers nowadays.
sentences.translation_zh: 如今许多传统乐器正在被电子合成器所取代。
sentences.translation_vi: Ngay nay nhieu nhac cu truyen thong dang bi thay the boi cac may tong hop dien tu.

constituents.label_vi: vi ngu bi dong tien hanh

sentences.text: The choir performed so beautifully that the audience gave them a standing ovation.
sentences.translation_zh: 合唱团表演得如此优美，以至于观众起立鼓掌。
sentences.translation_vi: Dan hop xuong trinh dien dep den muc khan gia dung day vo tay.

constituents.label_vi: tan ngu gian tiep + tan ngu truc tiep

sentences.text: He mentioned that the concert tickets had already been sold out.
sentences.translation_zh: 他提到音乐会的票已经售罄了。
sentences.translation_vi: Anh ay noi rang ve buoi hoa nhac da ban het roi.

constituents.label_vi: chu ngu menh de tuong thuat
vi ngu bi dong hoan thanh

sentences.text: The playlist that my friend created helps me relax after a long day.
sentences.translation_zh: 我朋友创建的播放列表帮助我在漫长的一天后放松。
sentences.translation_vi: Danh sach phat ma ban toi tao giup toi thu gian sau mot ngay dai.

sentences.text: If I could play any instrument, I would choose the violin because it sounds elegant.
sentences.translation_zh: 如果我能演奏任何乐器，我会选择小提琴，因为它听起来很优雅。
sentences.translation_vi: Neu toi co the choi bat ky nhac cu nao, toi se chon violin vi no nghe thanh lich.
